offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause financial mismanagement. We automate daily cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts lead to financial mismanagement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about financial tools
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo videos
Participate in community forums for accounting software
try_it: Let users try daily cash flow report generation for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Gather 10 interviews from potential users for feedback
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 sign-ups
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequent inputs as reusable templates
Set up default reminders for reports
Allow CSV import for existing cash flow data
Enable one-click export of summary reports
